'''Xoorzi''' was a fungus species that was found in abundance on the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] and [[Verkuyl]].<ref name="SoR" /> It was used as a medium for the growth of [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] bacteria in [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] production.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|343|xoorzi}}</ref> Any slight disturbance would cause it to release its spores and wither.<ref name="DNIII">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1stm}}
